name: omelette
title: Omelette
description: Native client for OpenRouter providing real-time streaming and chat history for large language models.
author: the_variable

commands.name: ask-question
commands.title: New Chat
commands.subtitle: Omelette
commands.description: Start a new chat with any OpenRouter model.

commands.title: History

commands.description: View and continue your previous conversations.

commands.description: Improve the writing of the selected text.

commands.name: fix-grammar
commands.title: Fix Grammar

commands.description: Fix grammar and spelling of the selected text.

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Translate to English

commands.name: custom-action
